heading: Response
body:
The response includes:

| Name          | Type    | Description                                                        |
| ------------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| access\_token | string  | The service account access token for authenticating API requests.  |
| token\_type   | string  | The mechanism for token authorization, here represented as Bearer. |
| expires\_in   | integer | The duration the access token is valid, in seconds.                |
